query: Implement the POST /uploads API so it creates a presigned S3 URL, validates MIME type, and records the upload intent in Postgres.
rationale: API, S3, upload, persistence, and security runtime work.

query: Review this Pulumi diff that adds CloudFront in front of our media bucket before we deploy it to prod.
Move image resizing out of the request path into a background worker with retries and job status.
rationale: Async processing, media, retries, runtime design.

query: Replace this cron container with EventBridge Scheduler and make sure missed runs and overlap are handled.
Add traces and alerts around the Lambda that sends billing webhooks so we can debug failures in production.
Make the upload progress bar CSS match the new design system colors and spacing.
rationale: UI-only styling with upload vocabulary but no runtime behavior.

query: Rewrite the README section that explains what serverless means for non-technical readers.
Create a React component called ApiStatusBadge with green, yellow, and red states.
rationale: Frontend component naming includes API but no backend/runtime work.

query: Update deployment docs after verifying how the Pulumi stack actually publishes the worker service.
rationale: Docs are involved, but task requires runtime and infrastructure verification.

query: Build a dashboard page for queue depth and worker failures using our existing metrics API.
rationale: Observability and runtime signals, not just UI styling.

query: Improve cache behavior for the product images on the landing page.
rationale: Likely CDN/object cache behavior; inspect context before deciding if UI-only.

query: Write a blog post comparing CloudFront and Cloudflare for startups.
rationale: Content creation, not repository runtime work.
